project.testCommand: npm run lint && npm run security
project.devServer: python3 -m http.server 5641 (from repo root; harness fetches /popup.html + real scripts)
project.branchPattern: one branch per BUILD: feature/bulk-delete (BD*), feature/pro-b2-phase3-billing (B3*); stories commit onto the build branch
project.mergePolicy: push branch + open PR (gh pr create) when all of a build's stories pass machine verification; PR body carries LB's live-test checklist; merge ONLY on LB's word after his real-browser test. Never commit to main.
rules: Stripe TEST MODE ONLY until LB says otherwise
secrets only in Supabase Edge Function secrets, never repo/chat
no silent automation changing what data leaves a device
no 4.0.0 version bump / CHANGELOG until store upload is prepared
claude-in-chrome cannot open chrome-extension:// pages; popup UI is verified via the test-harness on localhost, real-extension checks are LB's

stories.title: Popup test harness (dev-only)
stories.description: Create test-harness/ serving the REAL popup.html + popup.js + sync-*.js on localhost with a chrome-shim.js: in-memory chrome.storage.local/sync, stubbed identity/runtime/alarms/contextMenus, window.confirm auto-accept logging to window.__confirmCalls, fetch shim capturing Supabase request bodies to window.__fetchLog, seedable fixtures (10 prompts, mixed tags/favorites/sensitive, optional uuids + cloud mode). Add test-harness/ to CLAUDE.md never-include list and verify it is not in the pack-and-ship zip command.
acceptanceCriteria: real popup renders on localhost with seeded data
shim covers every chrome.* call popup.js makes at load

chromeVerification.setup: python3 -m http.server 5641 --directory test-harness (harness copies/rewrites nothing; it loads ../popup.html assets via symlink or fetch-served root — implementer picks the mechanism that keeps popup.html unmodified)
assertions: exactly 10 .prompt-item cards render from seeded fixtures
search box filters cards live (type a fixture title substring, card count drops)
window.__confirmCalls exists and confirm() is the shim (call it via javascript_tool, returns true and logs)
zero console errors after load + one search interaction

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED, observed in Chrome. Mechanism: loader.js fetches real /popup.html, injects <base href=/> + chrome-shim.js before first script, runs in same-origin srcdoc iframe (natural DOMContentLoaded). Assert via popupFrame.contentWindow. Verified all 3 modes: local (10 cards, search 10->1->10, confirm shim logs+accepts), cloud (10 cards, 8 uuids, shim intercepted GET profiles + GET prompts pull, 'Cloud sync on' status, zero console errors on tracked load), sync (10 cards, clean). Cloud seed: 8 uuid'd + 2 local-only (BD3 uses this). pb_last_push seeded AFTER fixture updatedAt so no spurious first push. __fetchLog entries carry tombstonesAtSend snapshot for BD3 ordering assertion. Serve REPO ROOT: python3 -m http.server 5641.

stories.title: Selection mode UI (Select toggle, checkboxes, action bar)
stories.description: Add Select button to toolbar; selectionMode + selectedIds Set (module-level, session-only); checkboxes on cards rendered from selectedIds in createPromptHTML; fixed bottom action bar with live count, Select all (visible set), Delete (N) disabled at 0, Cancel. Checkbox clicks via delegated handlePromptButtonClick data-action. Cancel/Escape exits and clears. CSS tokens only, dark-mode via existing overrides.

assertions: clicking Select renders a checkbox in every visible card and shows the action bar
checking 3 cards makes the count read '3 selected' and Delete button reads 'Delete (3)' and is enabled
Delete button is disabled when 0 selected
Select all checks all visible cards (count equals visible card count)
Cancel hides checkboxes + action bar and clears selectedIds (re-entering shows 0 selected)
Escape exits selection mode identically to Cancel
in normal mode: copy/edit/star buttons still dispatch (click star toggles isFavorite in shim storage)
zero console errors across the flow
needsHumanEye: action bar visual fit in the real popup (spacing, does not cover last card)

stories.title: Bulk delete — local/sync mode
stories.description: bulkDeleteSelected(): confirm('Delete N prompts? This cannot be undone.') with true total; resolve ids, one prompts.filter + single savePrompts, filterAndSortPrompts, exit mode. Confirm-cancel keeps selection and mode.
acceptanceCriteria: select-all under filter deletes only filtered set

flow: filter to a tag, select all, delete
select remaining, delete with shim set to reject once, then accept
assertions: window.__confirmCalls last message contains the exact selected count
after delete: DOM card count and shim storage prompts length both drop by exactly N
shim storage write count for the delete is exactly 1 savePrompts-driven write
tag-filtered select-all deletes only that tag's cards; other prompts intact in storage
deleting all remaining prompts renders the .no-prompts empty state
when confirm returns false: nothing deleted, selection mode + checked state intact
zero console errors

stories.title: Bulk delete — cloud mode tombstones
stories.description: In cloud mode, before the single save: await PBSync.recordTombstone(uuid) sequentially for every selected prompt WITH a uuid; no-uuid prompts delete with no tombstone. The save's push then flushes prompts + all tombstones (existing two-homogeneous-POST design). Never bypass deletePrompt/recordTombstone semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: one tombstone per uuid'd victim in pb_tombstones before save

chromeVerification.setup: harness seeded in cloud mode: storagePref=cloud, pb_session + pb_is_pro in shim storage, 6 prompts with uuids + 2 without, fetch shim capturing POST bodies
assertions: pb_tombstones contained 4 uuids (with deleted_at) before the push fired (fetch shim can assert tombstones present in storage at POST time)
the tombstone POST body contains exactly the 4 uuids with deleted_at set; the no-uuid victim appears in no POST
pb_tombstones is empty after the successful shimmed push (flush behavior)
storage prompts length dropped by 5 and DOM matches
exactly one push cycle fired (no per-victim pushes)
zero console errors
needsHumanEye: real two-device propagation (LB: bulk delete on device A disappears on device B) — covered in PR live-test checklist

stories.title: Filter interplay + polish
stories.description: Selection persists across search/filter/sort changes including hidden-selected cards; count always true total; hidden-selected included in delete; dark-mode action bar styling via tokens.

flow: select 2 from tag A, filter to tag B, select 1 more, clear filter, delete all 3
toggle prefers-color-scheme dark via emulation or harness override
assertions: after filtering to tag B the count still reads '2 selected' then '3 selected' after adding one
confirm message says 3; all 3 deleted including the two hidden at selection time
re-rendered checkboxes under changed filters reflect selectedIds (checked state re-derived)
action bar colors in dark mode come from the token palette (computed background != light-mode value)
zero console errors
needsHumanEye: dark-mode visual polish of checkboxes + action bar in the real popup

stories.title: Whole-branch review + PR (build 1 land)
stories.description: Whole-branch subagent review of feature/bulk-delete (Phase 2 pattern), fix findings, re-verify affected stories, push branch, gh pr create with LB live-test checklist (real popup selection UX, real cloud bulk delete to device B, dark mode look). Merge only on LB word.

chromeVerification.setup: n/a (review story) — re-run any harness assertions invalidated by review fixes
assertions: gh pr view returns the open PR URL
needsHumanEye: LB live-test checklist in PR body
